B2C Campaign - Gamma Prompt

Gamma.app prompt for generating the HeyZack B2C crowdfunding campaign deck

Gamma.app Prompt: HeyZack B2C Crowdfunding Deck

Presentation Brief

Create a 12-slide crowdfunding campaign deck for HeyZack, an AI-powered smart home system launching on Kickstarter.

Audience: Tech-savvy homeowners, environmentally-conscious consumers, early adopters Tone: Approachable, aspirational, exciting Style: Lifestyle-focused, warm, modern tech

Theme & Styling

Color Palette:

  • Primary: #243984 (deep blue) — trust, reliability
  • Accent: #E82F89 (vibrant pink) — excitement, CTAs
  • Background: White with lifestyle imagery
  • Text: #2E2D2C (near black)

Typography:

  • Headlines: Bold, friendly sans-serif
  • Body: Warm, readable, conversational

Visual Style:

  • Lifestyle photography (real homes, real people)
  • Warm lighting, inviting spaces
  • Product photos integrated naturally
  • Emotional connection over technical specs

Slide Content

Slide 1: Title

Your Home. Just Smarter. AI-Powered Smart Home for Everyone

Lifestyle hero image with modern living room “Join the Revolution” CTA

Slide 2: Problem

Smart Homes Shouldn’t Be Complicated

Current reality:

  • Multiple apps for every device
  • Confusing setup takes hours (or days)
  • Expensive systems that never pay off
  • Devices that don’t talk to each other

Visual: Frustrated person with too many apps

Slide 3: Personas

Built for Homeowners Like You

Meet Tyler — Tech-savvy, wants cutting-edge tech that just works Meet Emma — Energy-conscious, wants savings and sustainability

Both deserve better.

Visual: Diverse homeowner photos

Slide 4: Solution

Introducing HeyZack AI Home

  • One app for everything
  • AI that learns your lifestyle
  • Devices that work together automatically

Finally, a smart home that’s actually smart.

Visual: Product ecosystem with app

Slide 5: How It Works

Setup in Minutes. Smart Forever.

  1. Plug & Play — No electrician needed
  2. Connect — One app, all devices
  3. Relax — AI handles the rest

Visual: Simple 3-step icons

Slide 6: Products

128 Products. Endless Possibilities.

CategoryStarting Price
Lighting$29
Climate$49
Security$79
Sensors$19
Curtains$89
Energy$39

Visual: Product category grid

Slide 7: AI Features

AI That Actually Helps

  • Learns when you wake up, adjusts temperature
  • Detects when you leave, secures your home
  • Optimizes energy, cuts your bills 20-30%

Not rules. Not schedules. Real intelligence.

Visual: App showing AI learning

Slide 8: Tyler’s Story

“Finally, tech that just works together.”

Tyler connected 45 devices in one weekend. No hubs. No hassle.

“I’ve tried every smart home system. HeyZack is the first one where everything just… works.” — Tyler, Austin TX

Visual: Modern apartment, tech-forward

Slide 9: Emma’s Story

“From $400 to $280/month on energy.”

Emma’s HeyZack system paid for itself in 3 months.

“I was skeptical about ‘smart’ anything. Now I can’t imagine going back.” — Emma, Portland OR

Visual: Family home, warm and inviting

Slide 10: Rewards

Exclusive Backer Pricing

TierPriceIncludes
Starter$149 (~$199)5 devices, 1 hub
Home$349 (~$499)15 devices, 2 hubs, AI
Whole Home$699 (~$999)30 devices, 4 hubs, premium

30% OFF for Kickstarter backers

Visual: Product bundles

Slide 11: Trust

Join 10,000+ Smart Homeowners

  • ⭐ 4.8/5 App Store rating
  • 10,000+ happy customers
  • 128 products in ecosystem

Visual: Customer testimonials, trust badges

Slide 12: CTA

Make Your Home Smarter Today

Back us on Kickstarter and save 30%

[BACK THIS PROJECT]

kickstarter.com/heyzack

Gradient background with product family

Generation Settings

  • Layout: Lifestyle-focused, warm imagery
  • Images: Real home settings, diverse people
  • Tone: Conversational, not corporate
  • Animations: Subtle, welcoming
